title: cyperus stoloniferus
intro: Cyperus stoloniferus, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus stoloniferus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in the digestion and relief of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
